topic: Mamdani NYC mayor meta-prediction CP analysis
summary: CP for underlying Mamdani question is at 0.90 since Sep 7. Threshold is >0.91. CP was 0.92-0.93 in early Sep but drifted down. Mamdani leads polls by ~20 points in 4-way race.
content:
Meta-question: Will CP > 91% on Sep 24 for Mamdani mayor question?

Current CP: 0.90 (stable since Sep 7-14, ~8 days)
Threshold: strictly > 91.00% (so 0.91 doesn't count, needs 0.92+)
Resolution: Sep 24 (9 days away)

CP trajectory in September:
- Sep 1-4: 0.92-0.93 (above threshold)
- Sep 5-6: 0.91-0.93 (at/above)
- Sep 7-14: 0.90 (below threshold, stable)

Underlying race: Mamdani won Dem primary June 24, leads general polls 43-46% vs Cuomo 23-28%, Sliwa 14%, Adams 9%. 4-way race with opposition split. General election Nov 4.

Previous similar meta-q (post 39229): CP>90% on Aug 29 - CP of meta was ~40%, and the underlying CP on Aug 29 was exactly 0.90, so it likely resolved NO.

133 forecasters on underlying question = moderately stable CP.
